identity.name: Cardamom Export Portfolio
identity.design_principle: Fusion of Tradition and Modern Logistics

typography.font_installation: import { Playfair_Display, Manrope } from 'next/font/google' (or equivalent for React)

scale.h3: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-sans font-light tracking-wide uppercase
scale.caption: text-xs font-sans tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-bold

colors.usage_rules: Use 'background' (Bone White) for main surfaces. Use 'primary' (Deep Forest Green) for CTAs and key text. Use 'accent' (Spiced Gold) sparingly for highlights.

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise overlay to the background: opacity-5 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-primary/10. Avoid heavy shadows. Use 'outline' style for cards.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for interactive elements only. No heavy drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md bg-white/60 border border-white/20 for sticky nav and floating modals.

layout_strategies.grid_system: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Use grid-cols-12. Mix col-span-4, col-span-8, and col-span-6. Never use equal 3-column grids for products.
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Section padding: py-24 or py-32. Gap: gap-8 or gap-12.

hero_section.instruction: Left: Massive typography 'The Queen of Spices'. Right: Full height macro image of Cardamom pod. Scroll triggers parallax.

product_grid.instruction: Asymmetrical grid showcasing different grades (Alleppey Green, Coorg Green). Use hover reveal effects for details.

about_section.instruction: Text on one side, large plantation image on the other. Use 'sticky' positioning for text while images scroll.

contact_form.instruction: Use Shadcn Form. Remove default borders, use only bottom border for inputs (Material style but cleaner). Background: Transparent or very light beige.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for text. Scale-up (0.95 -> 1.0) for images on scroll.
motion.hover: Images: Scale 1.05, Grayscale -> Color. Buttons: Width expansion.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add Playfair Display and Manrope via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
2. SETUP THEME: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'colors' object defined above. Extend the theme, do not overwrite.
3. NOISE TEXTURE: Create a global CSS rule or a fixed div for the noise texture overlay.
4. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn components (Button, Input, Card), strip their default 'ring' and 'shadow' classes. Apply the 'visual_enhancers' rules instead.
5. IMAGES: Use the provided image_urls. Do not use placeholders.
6. NAVIGATION: Create a floating glassmorphism navbar. It should be transparent at top, and become glass on scroll.
7. FOOTER: Massive footer with 'Get in Touch' in 10vw size font.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle textures.
Avoid 'Inter' font for headings. Use Playfair Display.
Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Ensure mobile responsiveness: stack grids to 1 column, reduce font sizes slightly.
